description: baseline (v2 features, HOLD bias 3.0)
exp1: HOLD bias 3.0в†’1.0 вЂ” ci_low improved -5.61в†’-4.63, DD -9.18в†’-0.31%
exp2: RL_EPOCHS 1в†’2 вЂ” overfit, 6Г— turnover, ci_low -4.63в†’-5.71. Reverted.
exp3: PRETRAIN_EPOCHS 2в†’4 вЂ” equiv to exp1 (within noise), simpler wins. Reverted.
infra: batch sim per timestamp (4.5Г— speedup); RNG path differs. v3 baseline; old rows not apples-to-apples.
infra: N_SEEDS 3в†’10 for tighter median (now feasible after batched-sim speedup)
exp4 KEEP: drop signed_log_vol + vol_z_15 вЂ” sharpe -2.39в†’-1.08 (+1.30), per-seed variance 6Г— tighter, trades 13-51в†’11-17. Big win.
exp5: drop rv_15 too вЂ” sharpe -1.08в†’-1.32, ci_low -10.12в†’-10.30. Worse. rv_15 carries useful regime info, unlike the other 2. Reverted.
exp6 KEEP: RL_LR 1e-5в†’3e-5 вЂ” sharpe -1.08в†’-0.65 (+0.43), per-seed range tightened to [-0.78,-0.43], trades 5-11. Best so far.

v4 baseline @ 2wk eval: 9/10 seeds POSITIVE sharpe (+1.9 to +2.3, +$60-$73 pnl, 15-23 trades). 1 rogue seed: 6169 trades, -17.2% DD, -$8.6k. Auto-discard for DD violation. RL_LR=3e-5 too aggressive on longer train slice вЂ” runaway risk.
exp7 KEEP рџљЂ RL_LR 3e-5в†’2e-5 вЂ” ALL 10 SEEDS POSITIVE. Median sharpe +2.06, all DD в‰¤-0.32%, pnl +$56-$73, trades 15-27. First profitable AND stable config.
exp8: RL_LR 2.5e-5 вЂ” sharpe +2.06в†’+2.09 (within noise). 2e-5 is known-stable (exp7), 3e-5 had rogue seed. Keep safer side. Reverted.
exp9: HOLD bias 0.5 вЂ” sharpe +2.06в†’+0.58, per-seed variance 6Г— wider, 4/10 seeds non-positive. Less selective = worse. Reverted.
exp10 KEEP рџЋЇ HOLD bias 1.0в†’1.5 вЂ” sharpe +2.06в†’+2.31, per-seed range collapsed to [+2.28,+2.35], all DDs -0.30%, trades 13-15. Two discrete equilibria. New best.
exp11 KEEP рџЊђ +4 context features (VIX, TLT, UUP, SPY-cross). Sharpe +2.31в†’+2.35. KEY: 8/10 seeds (was 5/10) converge to the better +2.348 equilibrium. Macro context steers optimization.
exp12: CONTEXT_PATCHES 16в†’24 вЂ” sharpe +2.35в†’+2.26 (worse), policy more conservative (13в†’11 trades), 50% more compute. ci_low marginally better but that's per-seed noise. Reverted.
exp13: PRETRAIN_EPOCHS 2в†’3 вЂ” sharpe & ci_low IDENTICAL to exp11. Extra epoch wasted. Bottleneck isn't pretrain capacity. Reverted (simpler wins).
exp14: D_MODEL 96в†’64 вЂ” sharpe -0.09. Smaller model CAN'T find the +2.348 equilibrium (capped at +2.255). 96 was doing useful work. Reverted.

exp15: RL_EPOCHS 1в†’2 вЂ” CATASTROPHIC. 6/10 seeds at sharpe -3.3 to -3.7, pnl -$106 to -$121. 4/10 still profitable. Bimodal failure confirms RL=1 is the ceiling for this family. Same as exp2. Reverted.
exp16 (commit hash drift вЂ” was ENTROPY_COEF 0.01в†’0.05): sharpe +2.35в†’+2.26. Higher entropy pushed seeds OUT of the +2.348 optimum into the lower +2.255 equilibrium. Reverted.
exp17: D_MODEL 96в†’128 вЂ” sharpe IDENTICAL to exp11. Larger model doesn't help. D_MODEL=96 is the right size (64 worse, 96=128). Simpler wins. Reverted.
exp18: N_LAYERS 3в†’4 вЂ” sharpe slightly worse, more cross-seed variance. Depth doesn't help (8 consecutive discards). Reverted.
exp19: RL_REWARD_HORIZON 3в†’5 вЂ” IDENTICAL to exp11 (sharpe & ci_low). Reward horizon irrelevant. 9 consecutive discards confirms +2.348 is a strong attractor. Reverted.
exp20: VOL_PENALTY=10 вЂ” IDENTICAL to exp11 (penalty 20Г— smaller than reward = no effect on gradient direction). Policy convergence too deterministic for weak signal change. Reverted.
exp21: VOL_PENALTY=1000 вЂ” BIMODAL: 7/10 at +2.348, 3/10 CATASTROPHIC (-3.3 to -3.4 sharpe, -$106 to -$109). Median lucky. 30% tail-risk unacceptable. Reverted.
exp22: DROPOUT 0.1в†’0.0 вЂ” DISASTER. Sharpe -194, 2558 trades, pnl -$3078. Without dropout the action head overfits and goes degenerate. Reverted. Dropout is essential.
feat: strategy comparison table + picker Sharpe tracking. Primary unchanged from exp11; picker took 0 trades (broken thresholds вЂ” fixed in exp24).
exp24: redesigned picker (rank-based + auto-sell). Killed mid-run by manual cache wipe (mixed yfinance/Alpaca timestamp dtypes). Will re-test under v5 Alpaca data.

v5 BASELINE @ Alpaca 365d data (3 parallel seeds, 15min wall). Primary sharpe -1.08, picker sharpe -6.03. LOSES to passive (SPY +1.17, equal-wt +1.67). v4's +2.348 was 14d-window artifact. v4 LEADERBOARD INVALIDATED вЂ” all those keepers chased a non-generalizing metric. New target: beat passive.

exp26 KEEP: LONG_ONLY=True. Per-seed: 1/3 keeps profitable +$194, 2/3 don't trade ($0 vs v5's -$220 each). Mean pnl +$65 (vs v5's -$82). Killed catastrophic SELL-dominant equilibrium. Still loses to passive but no longer to v5.

exp27: USE_FORECAST_POLICY=True вЂ” IDENTICAL to exp26 (0 sharpe, same 1/3 trade pattern). Predicted Sharpe rarely crosses В±0.5. Forecast head doesn't have meaningful predictive content either. Reverted (simpler wins).

exp28 KEEP рџЋЇ MULTI-HORIZON prediction (1m/1h/1d/1w). First positive median sharpe on year-of-data (+0.96 vs v5's -1.08). 2/3 seeds find profitable equilibrium (was 1/3). Now ~85% of passive SPY (+0.96 vs +1.17).
exp29: FORECAST_HORIZON_IDX 1d вЂ” sharpe +0.96в†’+0.83 (worse). 27 trades (vs 12) but less efficient. 1h horizon is the sweet spot. Reverted.
exp30: threshold 0.5в†’0.3 вЂ” IDENTICAL to exp28. Seed 0's predicted Sharpe never even reaches 0.3. Threshold isn't the bottleneck; model confidence is. Reverted.
exp31: ENSEMBLE all horizons вЂ” DD -72.87% disaster. 1m horizon's tiny std в†’ huge Sharpe predictions dominate average в†’ wrong-direction trades. Reverted to 1h.

exp32 KEEP рџЋЇрџЋЇ STRATEGY 3 WEIGHTED dynamic sizing вЂ” primary unchanged but WEIGHTED strategy: sharpe +1.03, pnl +$1303 (+2.6%), 5 trades, DD -8.6%. SIX TIMES the PnL of best passive ($217 equal-wt). First strategy that meaningfully beats passive on absolute return.
exp33: KELLY_SCALE 1.0 вЂ” IDENTICAL to exp32. Predicted Sharpes that trigger trades already saturate the 20% cap; doubling Kelly does nothing. The CAP is the binding constraint. Reverted.
exp34 KEEP рџЋЇрџЋЇрџЋЇ cap 0.20в†’0.40 вЂ” weighted: sharpe +1.03в†’+1.24, pnl +$1303в†’+$2370 (+82%), DD -8.6в†’-12.6%. Nearly doubled PnL for 50% more DD вЂ” Kelly behaving as expected. New best.

exp35 KEEP рџЋЇрџЋЇрџЋЇрџЋЇ cap 0.40в†’0.50 вЂ” weighted: sharpe +1.24в†’+1.37, pnl +$2370в†’+$2948 (+24%), DD -12.6в†’-13.7%. BEST RESULT EVER. Beats SPY B&H by 50% on PnL (+$2948 vs +$1965). Cap still binding вЂ” keep ratcheting.
exp36 KEEP рџЋЇрџЋЇрџЋЇрџЋЇрџЋЇ cap 0.50в†’0.60 вЂ” weighted: sharpe +1.37в†’+1.50, pnl +$2948в†’+$3572 (+21%), DD -13.7в†’-14.6%. NEW BEST. Cap STILL binding (linear gains); push to 0.75 next.

exp37 KEEP рџЋЇрџЋЇрџЋЇрџЋЇрџЋЇрџЋЇ cap 0.60в†’0.75 вЂ” weighted: sharpe +1.50в†’+1.67, pnl +$3572в†’+$4568 (+28%), DD -14.6в†’-15.6%. SHARPE STILL RISING WITH DD вЂ” gains scale faster than vol. Push to 0.90 next.

exp38 KEEP рџЋЇрџЋЇрџЋЇрџЋЇрџЋЇрџЋЇрџЋЇ cap 0.75в†’0.90 вЂ” weighted: sharpe +1.67в†’+1.79, pnl +$4568в†’+$5551 (+22%), DD -15.6в†’-16.6%. NEW BEST. Sharpe still rising. Also: removed primary+picker strategies (refactor) + added 1-month chart. Next: cap 0.95.

exp39 DISCARD вљ пёЏ cap 0.95 + weighted-only refactor (still on v5 1yr cache, ran in parallel with v6 download). Sharpe +1.79в†’+0.97, pnl +$5551в†’+$683.
